heroDescription: Front-End Developer crafting responsive, accessible, and user-focused web applications with React, JavaScript, and modern web technologies. Passionate about building clean user experiences while continuously expanding my expertise in backend development, cloud technologies, and software engineering.
about: I'm a developer from South Africa with a background in Information Systems and Economics. I enjoy turning ideas into intuitive, responsive, and maintainable web applications that solve real-world problems.

My primary focus is front-end development using React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Tailwind CSS, where I prioritize performance, accessibility, and clean component architecture. Alongside front-end development, I'm actively strengthening my backend skills with technologies such as Node.js, Python, C#, SQL, and REST APIs to become a well-rounded full-stack developer.

I enjoy learning by building practical projects, whether it's dashboards, portfolio websites, productivity tools, or business applications. Every project is an opportunity to improve my problem-solving skills, write cleaner code, and create software that delivers real value.
I'm currently seeking opportunities where I can contribute, collaborate with experienced developers, and continue growing as a software engineer while building products that make a meaningful impact.
